product_name: Disney Toddler Real Feels Winnie the Pooh Plush

bullets: Press interactive pads on ears and feet to explore emotions
Squeeze heart for phrases that support emotional learning
Hug to activate soft glowing night light for bedtime comfort
Encourages emotional development, empathy and self-expression
Ultra-soft plush with sensory textures for soothing play
content.keywords: interactive plush toy, winnie the pooh plush, toddler night light toy, sensory plush toy, emotional development toy, talking plush toy, bedtime comfort toy, baby soft toy
content.description: Comfort, play and learn with the Disney Toddler Real Feels Winnie the Pooh Plush. Designed especially for little ones, Pooh features ultra-soft fabrics and comforting sensory textures to create a soothing, huggable companion. Interactive pads on Pooh’s ears and feet display different emotions with friendly faces – press them to hear phrases that help children understand feelings and express themselves. Squeeze Pooh’s heart for additional phrases, or give him a hug to activate a gentle glowing night light, perfect for bedtime reassurance. Hold the heart for 3 seconds to switch to bedtime mode, activating a soft glow in Pooh’s chest. Thoughtfully designed to support emotional development at every milestone, this comforting companion is part of the Disney Toddler range – bringing big fun for little ones.
